creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
How to duplicate:
- Visit https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi
- In the version dropdown, scroll down past "FreeBSD 1.0-RELEASE"
- Observe the lack of a "FreeBSD Ports 12.3" option between "FreeBSD Ports 13.0" and "FreeBSD Ports 12.2".
- Optionally, frown thoughtfully at lines 421 and 422 of https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/tree/website/content/en/cgi/man.cgi.
